content.en:
"The Heavenly Ancestors are so terrifying, my Blue Wolf Replica Body did not have the slightest power to resist, and it was directly annihilated!"

Ye Tian secretly sighed.

Under the arrival of the finger of that Heavenly Ancestor, even he couldn't move, and his own time and space were directly frozen.

Even if he copied his real body, it would end up like this, and even if he was ten times stronger and a hundred times stronger now, it would be the same.

This was the first time he had faced a Heavenly Ancestor, and he had truly seen the strength of the Heavenly Ancestor.

"I'm still far from Heavenly Ancestor!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he gained a lot this time, and his cultivation had reached the level of the seventh full-body refinement, although the replica body was annihilated, he could continue to reproduce it.

Soon, he replaced his entire body with the seventh level of full-body refinement.

After that, he continued to practice, striving to raise his cultivation to the level of the eighth full-body refinement.

However, to achieve this step is not only difficult, but also requires a long period of penance.

......

Genki Pavilion.

On this day, the Xuanqi Pavilion Pavilion Master and the six Deputy Pavilion Masters appeared in the headquarters Xuanqi Mountain one after another, and several hidden fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms also appeared one by one.

They're having a very important meeting.

At this time, every Great Ancestor had a heavy face.

At this time, Xuanqi Pavilion Master Xuanwu Great Ancestor said in an extremely heavy tone: "I think you all know that our Great Pavilion Master has fallen outside the realm!"

"The news is really true!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor's face turned pale, he knew what the fall of the Great Pavilion Lord meant to Xuanqi Pavilion.

Since the fall of the Xuanqi Heavenly Ancestor in the Endless Distant Era, the Xuanqi Realm is no longer in charge of them.

Moreover, with the continuous rise of Taichen Palace, three Heavenly Ancestors were born one after another, and the entire Xuanqi Territory has become the back garden of Taichen Palace.

And their Xuanqi Pavilion has been declining, and now they can only rely on the Great Pavilion Master to deter other forces.

The strength of the Great Pavilion Lord is not weak, even among the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, it is among the top ranks.

In the past few years, the Great Pavilion Lord has been wandering outside the realm, looking for an opportunity to break through the Heavenly Ancestor.

After all, if he had stayed in the Xuanqi Realm all the time, there would be no hope of breaking through at all, because the Xuanqi Realm had not helped the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms to impact the resources of the Heavenly Ancestor at all, and they would have been cleaned up by the Taiyuan Palace long ago.

Therefore, if you want to break through and become a Heavenly Ancestor, you must leave the Xuanqi Realm.

But they never expected that the Great Pavilion Master, who was ranked at the top of the fifth stage of high-level immeasurable lifeforms, would actually fall outside the realm, which was simply catastrophic news.

At this time, another deputy pavilion master said: "Xuanwu Pavilion Master, now that the Great Pavilion Lord has fallen, our Xuanqi Pavilion has lost the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and its strength has dropped greatly, and other forces are afraid that they will take the opportunity to deal with us!"

The Xuanwu Great Ancestor also knew this, and the purpose of this meeting was to discuss this.

"There aren't many forces in the Xuanqi Pavilion that can compete with our Xuanqi Pavilion, and even if the Great Pavilion Lord is lost now, it's not comparable to ordinary forces. The only ones who really threaten us and have the potential to attack us are the Outside Alliance and the Nine Yang Sea. "

"At most, the Outside Alliance has taken advantage, and it is impossible to directly start a war with our Xuanqi Pavilion. However, Jiuyang Sea is different, our Xuanqi Pavilion itself has a great contradiction with Jiuyang Sea, and has been competing for many territories and resources for a long time. Moreover, Jiuyang Sea also has a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and they really dare to attack us with all their might. "

"In order to prevent the loss from being too severe, some treasure lands should be given up, and the focus will be on the core territory. "

Subsequently, they began to assign tasks.

Xuanwu Great Ancestor ordered: "Xuanxin Great Ancestor, you go to guard Xuanwu Mountain. Xuanwu Mountain is very important to our Xuanqi Pavilion, and it must be guarded so as not to be invaded by other forces!"

"Yes!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor responded.

......

Xuanwu Mountain.

The Xuanxin Great Ancestor came here and opened the magic circle one by one.

The reason why Xuanwu Mountain is important is because it has a god's blood here, many resources are bred here, and there is also an immeasurable blood gold stone vein here.

Of course, the Infinite Blood Gold Stone Vein here is only a small vein, and the Infinite Blood Gold Stone has been mined, so it can only wait for a long time to give birth to an Infinite Blood Gold Stone.

But even so, this is a very important treasure.

"I hope other forces won't come to invade our Xuanqi Pavilion!"

Xuanxin Great Ancestor muttered.

But he knew very well that the resources that Xuanqi Pavilion currently had did not match his own strength, and Xuanqi Pavilion was now too weak, but the resources occupied a lot.

Jiuyanghai's resources are not as good as Xuanqi Pavilion, so Jiuyanghai will definitely not be convinced.

However, they are also unwilling to let them give up most of their resources, at most a few unimportant places.

It didn't take long for the news of the fall of the Great Pavilion Master of Xuanqi Pavilion to spread.

For a moment, the entire Xuanqi Territory was shocked.

......

"That Great Pavilion Master of the Xuanqi Pavilion has fallen?"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, that one was said to be the top fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, and he also had the treasures left by the Xuanqi Heavenly Ancestor, how strong his life-saving ability was.

Such a great ancestor actually fell outside the realm!

Ye Tian didn't know how the other party fell, and he didn't care.

But this time, the strength of Xuanqi Pavilion has been greatly damaged, and I am afraid that it will cause some big problems!

Of course, even if something happened to Xuanqi Pavilion, it had nothing to do with him.

However, it's not bad to go and see the excitement.

Time passed slowly, and many forces were ready to move.

And Jiuyang Sea is naturally also eyeing Xuanqi Pavilion, Jiuyang Hai, which has a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable life form, naturally does not take Xuanqi Pavilion in his eyes now.

However, Jiuyang Sea did not dare to directly invade Xuanqi Mountain, the headquarters of Xuanqi Pavilion.

Xuanqi Mountain has the magic circle that Xuanqi Heavenly Ancestor once arranged, as well as many means, even if Jiuyang Sea pours out, it will not be able to break through Xuanqi Mountain, and may even suffer heavy losses.

However, they were able to snatch the many treasures of the Xuanqi Pavilion.

They discussed for a long time and decided to take action against the Xuanwu Mountain in the Xuanqi Pavilion.

Xuanwu Mountain is relatively close to the territory of Jiuyang Sea, and they can completely eat Xuanwu Mountain and the nearby territory in one go, and turn it into the territory of Jiuyang Sea.

Of course, Jiuyang Sea still had to involve the other fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of Xuanqi Mountain, otherwise it would not be easy to capture Xuanwu Mountain.

"I have to ask Jiuyang Ancestor to take action personally!"

A senior Jiuyanghai executive proposed.

Soon, Jiuyang Great Ancestor went out of the customs and went directly to Xuanqi Mountain, sitting cross-legged in the void outside Xuanqi Mountain.

With him here, the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms of the Xuanqi Pavilion would definitely not dare to go out.

Subsequently.

The fourth stage of the Jiuyang Sea digital high-level immeasurable lifeforms went to Xuanwu Mountain, and a big battle was about to begin!
